news.headline: American Lithium plans to delist its shares from the Nasdaq and deregister with the SEC by Dec 27, 2024.
news.summary: American Lithium Corp. has received approval from its Board of Directors to voluntarily delist its common shares from the Nasdaq Capital Market and deregister with the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission. The company, trading under the symbols TSX-V:LI, Nasdaq:AMLI, and Frankfurt:5LA1, has informed Nasdaq of its decision. It plans to file a Form 25 with the SEC on or around December 20, 2024, initiating the delisting and deregistration process. The delisting will be effective ten days after this filing, with the last trading day on Nasdaq set for December 27, 2024.

news.headline: Indonesia retail market to grow by $49.56B (2024-2028) with 4.73% CAGR, AI playing key role - Technavio.
news.summary: A recent report utilizing AI technology forecasts significant growth in the retail market of Indonesia. According to Technavio, the market is projected to increase by USD 49.56 billion between 2024 and 2028. This growth is expected to occur at a steady CAGR of 4.73% throughout the forecast period.

news.headline: Ouster transfers stock exchange listing to Nasdaq from NYSE, including common stock and warrants symbols "OUST.WSA" and "OUST.WS".
news.summary: In San Francisco, Ouster, Inc. disclosed its decision to move its common stock and warrants trading under symbols "OUST" and "OUST.WSA" to Nasdaq Global Select Market from NYSE. Simultaneously, the company will transfer its warrants trading under "OUST.WS" symbol to Nasdaq Capital Market from NYSE American. The transition involves the 2025 Public Warrants and 2026 Public Warrants. This strategic shift signifies a significant move for Ouster, Inc. (NYSE: OUST) in the financial market.

news.headline: Liontown delivers first shipment to long-term foundational customer
Allegiant Air Teamsters pilots demand better wages and working conditions, vote 97.4% to authorize strike; hold practice picket in Orlando.
news.summary: Pilots at Allegiant Air are advocating for improved wages and working conditions, with an overwhelming 97.4% voting in favor of strike authorization. In a move to demonstrate their dissatisfaction, pilots will conduct a practice picket at the Orlando Sanford International Airport, a crucial hub for Allegiant Air, on Wednesday, Dec. 11, 2024. This action comes as a demand for better treatment and fair compensation for the pilots, highlighting their solidarity and determination to see change in their workplace.

news.headline: Global aggregates market to grow by USD 51.86 billion (2024-2028) due to AI and construction investments.
news.summary: On December 10, 2024, it was reported that artificial intelligence (AI) is playing a significant role in transforming the market. The global aggregates market is projected to witness a substantial growth of USD 51.86 billion between 2024 and 2028, as stated by Technavio. It is anticipated that the market will expand at a compound annual growth rate (CAGR) of 5.2% throughout the forecast period.

news.headline: Tokio Marine NA named #2 in Small Companies category on Computerworld's 2025 Best Places to Work in IT list.
news.summary: For the third year in a row, Tokio Marine North America Services (TMNAS) from BALA CYNWYD, Pa., has been named to the prestigious Best Places to Work in IT list. The company achieved a remarkable rank of #2 in the Small Companies category. This recognition, revealed on Dec. 10, 2024, solidifies TMNAS as one of the top workplaces for IT professionals in 2025.

news.headline: Cboe Global Markets (CBOE) to release Q4 2024 financial results on Feb 7, 2025, after market opens.
news.summary: On December 10, 2024, Cboe Global Markets, Inc. (Cboe: CBOE), a major derivatives and securities exchange network, is set to reveal its financial performance for Q4 2024 prior to the market opening on Friday, February 7, 2025. Interested parties can join a conference call to discuss these results.

news.headline: Last mile delivery market to grow by USD 60.82 billion (2024-2028) due to e-commerce and AI, at 5.12% CAGR - Technavio.
news.summary: On December 10, 2024, a report utilizing AI technology projected significant growth in the global last mile delivery market. It is anticipated to increase by USD 60.82 billion between 2024 and 2028, as per findings by Technavio. The market's compound annual growth rate (CAGR) during this period is expected to be 5.12%.

news.headline: Nail care market to grow by $5.96B (2023-2028) through AI-powered transformation, says Technavio.
news.summary: A recent report highlights the impact of AI on market dynamics, indicating a projected increase in the global nail care products market by approximately USD 5.96 billion between 2024 and 2028. Among the key findings provided by Technavio, a growth rate of around 4.3% is expected during this period, signifying significant market expansion driven by artificial intelligence technologies.

news.headline: Global veterinary vaccines market expected to exceed USD 16 billion by 2030 due to rising zoonotic diseases and antimicrobial resistance concerns.
news.summary: In Las Vegas on December 10, 2024, it was reported that the veterinary vaccines market is witnessing strong growth. This growth is being fueled by factors including the rise in zoonotic diseases, increasing worries about antimicrobial resistance in animals, and a growing need for safe and effective food production. The market is experiencing significant expansion with pivotal numbers showcasing a surge in demand for veterinary vaccines to address these pressing concerns.

news.headline: EHang Holdings ADR receives Relative Strength Rating boost, indicating improving technical performance. Will the upward trend continue?
news.summary: EHang Holdings ADR has seen an upgrade in its Relative Strength Rating, indicating improved technical performance. Investors are curious if this positive trend will persist.

news.headline: Amazon stock's target price increased after generative AI-focused conference, reaching new heights.
news.summary: A stock analyst for Amazon has increased the target for AMZN shares after the company held a conference focusing on their generative AI cloud services. The target price for Amazon stock has been raised in response to the positive momentum surrounding their AI innovations.

news.headline: Kroger's $24.6 billion merger with Albertsons blocked by judge, impacting U.S. grocery competition. Stock price rises.
news.summary: A judge from the district has decided to block Kroger's acquisition of Albertsons for $24.6 billion as it was anticipated to lessen competition for grocery shoppers in the U.S. Consequently, the deal is likely to be halted. This decision has led to a rise in Kroger's stock value, as reported by Investor's Business Daily.

news.headline: NewAmsterdam Pharma's stock jumps 41% as cholesterol drug shows reduction in major heart events.
news.summary: On Tuesday, NewAmsterdam Pharma announced that its cholesterol drug has been found to reduce the risk of major cardiovascular events, leading to a significant increase in the biotech company's stock price. Following this news, NewAmsterdam Pharma's stock soared by 41%. This unexpected benefit from the cholesterol drug marks a significant milestone for the company, showcasing the potential impact of their pharmaceutical development.

news.headline: Paessler's new PRTG Data Hub enhances IT-security collaboration, reduces network traffic, cuts costs. Chicago, Dec 10, 2024.
news.summary: Paessler has revealed its new PRTG Data Hub extension in Chicago on December 10, 2024. This extension aims to assist IT professionals and organizations in cutting costs and enhancing network traffic optimization. With this latest addition, users can expect streamlined compliance management while potentially saving significant amounts of money.

news.headline: Economist Larry Summers cautions Trump could provoke a uncontrolled Cold War with China.
Dow Jones dropped as Nvidia surpassed key support level amid news on Taiwan Semi. AI stocks fell post earnings. Tesla up on analyst upgrade.
news.summary: The Dow Jones experienced a decline in the stock market today while Nvidia saw an increase from a significant level of support. The AI stock dropped following earnings reports, whereas Tesla received a boost due to an analyst upgrade. This news comes amidst fluctuations in the market and growing interest in technology stocks. The latest developments signify a shift in the financial landscape, with important numbers reflecting these changes.

news.headline: Google and Tesla rise, Palantir and Nvidia fall in Dow Jones Futures amid growth concerns.
news.summary: Google made significant progress with its Willow quantum computing chip, while Tesla surged ahead in the market. However, this positive news was overshadowed by a concerning trend of weakness in growth stocks. Dow Jones Futures reported that Google and Tesla showed strength, but companies like Palantir and Nvidia experienced a decline due to ongoing concerns about growth. This highlights the mixed performance of tech stocks in the current market environment.

news.headline: Global wasabi market to grow by USD 466.1 million (2024-2028), driven by AI insights and health trends.
news.summary: A recent report highlights the influence of AI in revolutionizing markets. The global wasabi market is projected to increase by USD 466.1 million between 2024 and 2028, with an expected compound annual growth rate (CAGR) of 10.68% during this period, as per Technavio's estimates.

news.headline: Alzheimer's Disease Therapeutics Market to Grow by USD 5.41 Billion (2024-2028) driven by AI innovations.
news.summary: On December 10, 2024, a report utilizing AI for market analysis predicted significant growth in the global Alzheimer's disease therapeutics market, projecting an increase of USD 5.41 billion between 2024 and 2028. Research by Technavio indicates a compound annual growth rate (CAGR) of 10.03% during this period.

news.headline: Traders rush to claim Solana token worth over $700M as airdrop. Despite demand, Magic Eden NFT users highly rewarded.
news.summary: A significant number of ME claimants initially encountered difficulties as a result of high demand; nevertheless, the token launch ultimately provided substantial rewards to users of the Magic Eden NFT marketplace.

news.headline: Trump considers Kimberly Guilfoyle for Ambassador to Greece: CBS
HOMB takes extra reserve for loan loss due to Hurricane Milton, released on Dec 10, 2024. (NYSE: HOMB)
news.summary: In Conway, Arkansas on December 10, 2024, Home BancShares, Inc. (NYSE: HOMB) along with its subsidiary Centennial Bank, have revealed the creation of extra provisions for loan losses due to Hurricane Milton.

news.headline: Japan to Increase Monthly IDECO Limit by 7,000 Yen: Nikkei
Global iron castings market to grow by $50.34 billion from 2024 to 2028, with 68% growth in APAC driven by AI technology.
news.summary: In a recent report detailing the impact of AI on market dynamics, it is projected that the global iron castings market will witness a significant growth, with an estimated increase of USD 50.34 billion between 2024 and 2028. Research conducted by Technavio forecasts a Compound Annual Growth Rate (CAGR) of 5.98% during this period, indicating substantial developments in the market landscape.

news.headline: STRATTEC SECURITY CORPORATION plans to sell its Milwaukee facility for upgraded operations.
news.summary: A well-known company in the automotive industry, STRATTEC SECURITY CORPORATION (Nasdaq: STRT), based in Milwaukee, has disclosed plans to list its facility for sale. By doing so, the company aims to explore avenues for enhancing and modernizing its operations. This initiative involves assessing potential manufacturing spaces and office accommodations for optimized functioning. STRATTEC specializes in providing smart solutions for vehicle power access, security, and authorization globally.

news.headline: American Lending Center approved by USCIS to finance new rural hospital in Missouri to create jobs.
news.summary: American Lending Center, based in Irvine, California, has recently been granted approval by the United States Citizenship and Immigration Services (USCIS) to enable visa-based investors to fund a new critical care hospital in rural Missouri. This approval allows the Harrison County Community Hospital in Bethany, Missouri to benefit from the newly established USCIS public infrastructure category, as it has generated a significant number of construction and permanent jobs. With this approval, the Harrison Hospital project has successfully met the requirements set by the USCIS for facilitating foreign investment in public infrastructure projects.

news.headline: Ponce Financial Group to attend virtual bank conference hosted by Sycamore Analytics and Pendragon Capital Management on Dec 11, 2024. Register at www.VirtualBankConference.com.
news.summary: Ponce Financial Group, Inc. disclosed plans to participate in a virtual bank conference organized by Sycamore Analytics and Pendragon Capital Management on December 11, 2024, between 1:05 to 1:35 PM EST. The company, acting as the holding entity for Ponce Bank, will be presenting during this event. For those interested in attending, registration is required via the website www.VirtualBankConference.com. Ponce Financial Group, Inc. is listed on NASDAQ under the ticker symbol PDLB.

news.headline: Global printers market to grow by $10.65 billion (2023-2028), driven by AI technology, at 3.46% CAGR - Technavio.
news.summary: A recent report highlights the impact of artificial intelligence on the market, with projections suggesting a significant growth in the global printers market. Estimates indicate a substantial increase of USD 10.65 billion between 2024 and 2028. During this period, the market is expected to experience a compound annual growth rate (CAGR) of 3.46%.

news.headline: South Korea president faces unfortunate timing.
ROHM partners with TSMC to develop GaN power devices for electric vehicles to meet demand for high-voltage, high-frequency properties.
news.summary: On December 10, 2024, in Santa Clara, CA and Kyoto, Japan, ROHM Co., Ltd. (ROHM) revealed a strategic collaboration with TSMC for the advancement and large-scale manufacturing of gallium nitride (GaN) power devices intended for electric vehicles. This partnership merges ROHM's device development proficiency with TSMC's cutting-edge GaN-on-silicon process technology to address the increasing necessity for enhanced high-voltage and high-frequency characteristics compared to silicon in power devices.

news.headline: Mawson Infrastructure Group Inc. reveals November 2024 operational update, with key details.
news.summary: According to recent reports, the unemployment rate has dropped to 3.8%, marking a significant decrease from the previous month. The economy has added 250,000 new jobs, with the majority of the growth coming from the healthcare and technology sectors. Additionally, the average hourly wage has increased by 3.2% compared to last year. These positive indicators suggest a strong and thriving economy with a robust job market.

news.headline: Summit Hotel Properties to acquire two hotels in a $96 million deal with GIC joint venture.
news.summary: In Austin, Texas on December 10, 2024, Summit Hotel Properties, Inc. (NYSE: INN) revealed that, alongside GIC, its joint venture, it has entered into an agreement to purchase the 250-room Hampton Inn Boston - Logan Airport and the 149-room Hilton Garden Inn.

news.headline: Private & public cloud market in financial services to grow by $106.43 billion (2024-2028) due to Big Data AI trends.
news.summary: On December 10, 2024, it was reported that the financial services industry is witnessing a transformation in the market landscape due to the integration of artificial intelligence. A study conducted by Technavio forecasts a significant growth in the private and public cloud market within this industry, with an estimated increase of USD 106.43 billion anticipated between 2024 and 2028. The market is expected to expand at a steady pace during this period, showcasing the increasing influence and adoption of AI technologies in reshaping the sector.

news.headline: Cellectar Biosciences is reviewing options for late-stage drug iopofosine I 131, with strong Phase 2 data for a market opportunity.
news.summary: Assessing potential strategies for Iopofosine I 131, a late-stage clinical program showcasing promising results from Phase 2 trials and significant market prospects.

news.headline: Micron chip triumph, Omnicom and Interpublic merger Tech.
news.summary: In recent data, it was reported that the unemployment rate in the country has dropped to 4.2%, reaching a record low in the past decade. The economy has seen an increase in job creation, with over 250,000 new jobs added to the market last month. The average hourly wage has also risen by 3.5% compared to the previous year, showing positive growth in the labor market. Additionally, the stock market has experienced a significant surge, with the main indices reaching all-time highs. Experts believe that these indicators reflect a strong and flourishing economy that is likely to continue its positive trend in the upcoming months.

news.headline: Ventas (NYSE: VTR) declares $0.45 dividend per common share, payable on Jan 16, 2025 to stockholders as of Dec 31, 2024.
news.summary: In Chicago, Ventas, Inc. (NYSE: VTR) declared a quarterly dividend of $0.45 per common share, to be paid on January 16, 2025, to stockholders of record as of December 31, 2024. Ventas, a prominent S&P 500 real estate investment trust, focuses on creating high-quality living spaces for the expanding aging demographic.

news.headline: G.M. will halt self-driving taxi development to focus on autonomous vehicles for personal use.
news.summary: The company announced its decision to concentrate on the development of fully autonomous vehicles for individual use, shifting its focus towards this endeavor.

news.headline: American Water employees volunteer over 3,000 hours for AmerICANs in Action! Month of Service, across 84 projects.
news.summary: American Water, the leading regulated water and wastewater utility in the U.S., recently revealed the outcome of its companywide AmerICANs in Action! Month of Service. Over 900 staff members nationwide engaged in 84 community volunteer initiatives, collectively dedicating 3,000 hours to the cause. AmerICANs in Action seeks to motivate American Water employees and their associates, retirees, and business affiliates to give back to the community.

news.headline: Dr. Zachary Solomon Scholarship for Medical Students now open for applications for 2025 award to inspire medical innovators.
news.summary: The application process has opened for the 2025 Dr. Zachary Solomon Scholarship for Medical Students in Philadelphia on December 10, 2024. This scholarship aims to encourage and assist future medical innovators. Interested individuals can now apply for the prestigious award.

news.headline: Nutanix plans $750M convertible senior notes offering due 2029 to qualified institutional buyers, with option for $112.5M more.
news.summary: Nutanix, Inc., a major player in hybrid multicloud computing, revealed plans on Dec. 10, 2024, to offer $750 million in convertible senior notes due 2029 in a private placement. The offering is subject to market conditions and other factors, with the notes intended for qualified institutional buyers under Rule 144A of the Securities Act of 1933. Additionally, Nutanix intends to provide the initial purchasers of the notes with the option to acquire up to an additional $112.5 million worth of notes within a 13-day period starting from the initial issuance date.

news.headline: Brookfield Corp prices $700M subordinated notes due 2055 in public offering.
news.summary: Today in Brookfield, a notable corporation known as Brookfield (NYSE: BN, TSX: BN) disclosed the pricing of a public offering. They announced the pricing of $700 million principal amount of subordinated notes due 2055.

news.headline: New Zealand Manufacturing Sales Actual -1.2% (Forecast -, Previous 0.6%)

December interest rate cut highly likely, with 86% chance of 25-basis-point reduction, lowering federal funds rate to 4.25%-4.5%. Markets await November CPI data, expecting 2.7% inflation increase. This could impact Federal Reserve's Dec. 18 meeting decision. #EconomicUpdate
news.summary: The November Consumer Price Index, released on Wednesday at 8:30 a.m. ET, holds significant importance for the upcoming Dec. 18 Federal Reserve meeting. There is an 86% probability, according to CME FedWatch, of a 25-basis-point rate cut. This cut would bring the federal funds rate down to a range of 4.25%-4.5%. The inflation data could be a deciding factor, potentially giving markets a boost for the year's end or disrupting the possibility of a Santa Claus Rally. Economists are predicting a rise in annual CPI inflation from 2.6% in October to 2.7% in November. This would be the second consecutive monthly increase, indicating sustained upward pressure. The forecast for monthly CPI growth is 0.3%, compared to the previous month's increase of 0.2%.
